title: Homepage banner not loading
description: The homepage banner image is not displaying correctly on mobile devices.

title: Checkout payment error
description: Customers are receiving an error message when trying to pay with credit cards.

title: Broken product image links
description: Several product images are returning 404 errors after theme update.

title: Shipping rates not calculating
description: Live shipping rates are not appearing at checkout for Australia zone.

title: Meta Pixel not tracking conversions
description: Meta Pixel is installed but not recording purchase events.

title: Product variants not syncing
description: Color variants are not syncing properly between language versions.

title: Theme customization request
description: Client wants homepage redesigned with minimal white layout.

title: Digital product download issue
description: Customers are not receiving download link after purchasing digital product.

title: Slow page load speed
description: Product pages are loading slowly due to unoptimized images.

title: Collection sorting issue
description: Collections are not sorting products by best-selling as configured.

title: TikTok pixel duplication
description: Duplicate TikTok pixel detected causing inaccurate event tracking.

title: App integration conflict
description: Bundle app conflicting with review app on product page.

title: Domain SSL warning
description: SSL certificate warning appearing on checkout page.

title: Product CSV import error
description: CSV file import failing due to incorrect variant formatting.

title: Footer links misaligned
description: Footer links appear misaligned on tablet view after theme update.
